title: TC-LENS-001: Verify Poly Voyager Free 60+ appears in lens.poly.com Inventory after successful enrollment
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Voyager Free 60+ earbuds are paired and connected to a smartphone running Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Device Settings → verify device is enrolled to the organization (check MDM/EMM enrollment status).
3. Open a web browser and navigate to https://lens.poly.com.
4. Log in with administrator credentials that have access to Manage > Policies.
5. Navigate to Manage → Inventory.
6. Locate the Poly Voyager Free 60+ device in the inventory list by serial number or device name.
7. Verify the device status shows as 'Enrolled' or 'Active'.
8. Note the device serial number and current firmware version displayed.
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ device is listed in the lens.poly.com Inventory page with status 'Enrolled' or 'Active', displaying its serial number and firmware version.

title: TC-LENS-002: Verify Poly Voyager Free 60+ appears in Manage > Policies > Individual Device list when a policy is assigned
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-001 to confirm the device is in Inventory.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies.
3. Click 'Add Policy' or select an existing policy (e.g., 'Default Audio Policy').
4. Under 'Assignment' section, select 'Individual Devices' as the assignment type.
5. In the device search field, type the serial number or name of the Poly Voyager Free 60+.
6. Select the device from the search results and assign the policy.
7. Click 'Save' or 'Apply' to confirm the policy assignment.
8. Navigate back to Manage → Policies → select the same policy.
9. Click on 'Assigned Devices' or 'Individual Device' tab.
10. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ is listed in the Individual Device list.
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ device appears in the Individual Device list under the assigned policy, confirming the device is selectable and assignable via the policy management UI.

title: TC-LENS-003: Verify Poly Voyager Free 60+ can be removed from a policy via Individual Device list
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-002 to confirm the device is assigned to a policy and visible in the Individual Device list.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies.
3. Select the policy that has the Poly Voyager Free 60+ assigned.
4. Click on 'Assigned Devices' or 'Individual Device' tab.
5. Locate the Poly Voyager Free 60+ in the list.
6. Click the checkbox next to the device or click the 'Remove' / 'Unassign' button/icon.
7. Confirm the removal in any dialog that appears (click 'Yes', 'Remove', or 'Confirm').
8. Click 'Save' or 'Apply' to persist the change.
9. Refresh the page (F5 or browser refresh).
10. Navigate back to Manage → Policies → select the same policy → Individual Device list.
11. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ is no longer listed.
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ is successfully removed from the policy's Individual Device list and no longer appears after page refresh, confirming the policy removal workflow functions correctly.

title: TC-LENS-004: Verify device not in Individual Device list when no policy is assigned (empty state)
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-001 to confirm the device is in Inventory.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies.
3. Select any existing policy that does NOT have the Poly Voyager Free 60+ assigned.
4. Click on 'Assigned Devices' or 'Individual Device' tab.
5. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ is NOT listed in the Individual Device list.
6. If the list is empty, verify the empty state message is displayed (e.g., 'No devices assigned' or 'No individual devices').
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ does not appear in the Individual Device list for policies it is not assigned to. An appropriate empty state message is displayed when no devices are assigned.

title: TC-LENS-005: Verify device appears in Individual Device list immediately after policy assignment (no delay)
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-001 to confirm the device is in Inventory.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies.
3. Select a policy or create a new one.
4. Assign the Poly Voyager Free 60+ as an Individual Device and click 'Save'.
5. Immediately (within 5 seconds) navigate back to Manage → Policies → select the same policy → Individual Device list.
6. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ appears in the list without requiring a page refresh or waiting period.
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ appears in the Individual Device list immediately after policy assignment, with no propagation delay.

title: TC-LENS-006: Verify device removal from Individual Device list persists after browser session ends
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-002 to confirm the device is assigned to a policy.
2. Remove the Poly Voyager Free 60+ from the policy following steps 4-11 of TC-LENS-003.
3. Close the browser completely (all tabs/windows).
4. Open a new browser window and navigate to https://lens.poly.com.
5. Log in with the same administrator credentials.
6. Navigate to Manage → Policies → select the same policy → Individual Device list.
7. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ is still not listed.
expected: The policy removal persists across browser sessions — the Poly Voyager Free 60+ remains absent from the Individual Device list after closing and reopening the browser.

title: TC-LENS-007: Verify device re-appears in Individual Device list after re-assignment following removal
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-003 to confirm the device has been removed from the policy.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies.
3. Select the same policy used in TC-LENS-003.
4. Re-assign the Poly Voyager Free 60+ as an Individual Device.
5. Click 'Save' or 'Apply'.
6. Navigate to the Individual Device list.
7. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ appears again in the list.
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ can be re-assigned to the same policy after removal and appears in the Individual Device list, confirming the assignment lifecycle (assign → remove → re-assign) works correctly.

title: TC-LENS-008: Verify device not listed in Individual Device list when device is removed from Inventory
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-002 to confirm the device is assigned to a policy and visible in Individual Device list.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Inventory.
3. Locate the Poly Voyager Free 60+ device.
4. Remove or decommission the device from Inventory (click 'Remove' or 'Decommission' and confirm).
5. Navigate to Manage → Policies → select the policy → Individual Device list.
6. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ is no longer listed in the Individual Device list.
7. Navigate back to Manage → Inventory and verify the device is no longer listed or shows 'Decommissioned' status.
expected: The Poly Voyager Free 60+ is automatically removed from the policy's Individual Device list when the device is removed or decommissioned from Inventory.

title: TC-LENS-009: Verify search/filter functionality for Poly Voyager Free 60+ in Individual Device list
steps: 1. Complete TC-LENS-002 to confirm the device is assigned to a policy.
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies → select the policy → Individual Device list.
3. In the search/filter field above the device list, type the full serial number of the Poly Voyager Free 60+.
4. Verify the device appears as the only result.
5. Clear the search field.
6. Type a partial serial number (first 4-5 characters).
7. Verify the Poly Voyager Free 60+ appears in the filtered results.
8. Type a non-matching string (e.g., 'ZZZZZ').
9. Verify no devices are shown and a 'No results' message is displayed.
expected: The search/filter functionality correctly filters the Individual Device list: full serial number returns the device, partial serial number returns the device, and non-matching string returns no results with appropriate empty state message.

title: TC-LENS-010: Verify multiple Poly Voyager Free 60+ devices can be assigned to and removed from a policy simultaneously
steps: 1. Ensure at least two Poly Voyager Free 60+ devices are enrolled and visible in lens.poly.com Inventory (repeat TC-LENS-001 for a second device).
2. In lens.poly.com, navigate to Manage → Policies.
3. Select a policy or create a new one.
4. Under 'Individual Devices', search for and select both Poly Voyager Free 60+ devices.
5. Click 'Save' or 'Apply'.
6. Navigate to the Individual Device list and verify both devices are listed.
7. Select the checkboxes for both devices.
8. Click 'Remove' or 'Unassign' and confirm.
9. Click 'Save' or 'Apply'.
10. Refresh the page and verify neither device appears in the Individual Device list.
expected: Multiple Poly Voyager Free 60+ devices can be assigned to a policy simultaneously and appear in the Individual Device list. Both devices can be removed together in a single operation and neither appears after removal.
